Login.signUpNotice: Account created. Check your email to confirm, then sign in.
Login.googleNoCodeError: Google sign-in did not return a code.

Onboarding.slide1Title:
Know Your Voice.
Elevate Every Note.
Onboarding.slide1Body: AI-powered vocal performance scoring, ranking and battles — for singers who want to get better.
Onboarding.slide2Body: Paste a YouTube link to any vocal performance. We embed it — never download or host the audio.
Onboarding.slide3Body: Pitch, tone, emotion, control and more — shown as a Provisional AI Estimate, calibrated by experts.
Onboarding.slide4Body: Go head-to-head, earn votes from verified listeners, and rise up the worldwide leaderboard.

Profile.empty: You haven't added any performances yet.
Profile.notSignedInSub: Sign in to see your profile and performances.
Profile.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes your account and all your performances, scores, votes, and listen history. This cannot be undone.
Profile.deleteFinalBody: This is your last chance to cancel. Your account will be permanently deleted.
Profile.sessionExpired: Your session expired — please sign in again and retry.
Profile.deleteGenericError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

Song.sub: Who sings this song best — ranked by score.
Song.empty: No performances of this song yet.

Standings.title: Battle standings
Standings.empty: No battles yet. Open the Battle arena to start one.

League.title: Weekly League
League.signIn: Sign in to see your weekly cohort.
League.empty: You will enter a cohort next Monday. Verified activity earns points now.
League.error: The weekly league could not be loaded.

Leagues.title: Your private leagues
Leagues.error: The league could not be updated.
Leagues.name: League name

Measure.title: Measure my recording
Measure.signinPrompt: Sign in to measure your recording ›
Measure.honestyBody1: Sing 20–60 seconds of YOUR OWN performance into the microphone. Our server measures the audio itself — pitch control, timing, vibrato, signal quality — and those four criteria replace the AI estimate with a Measured score.
Measure.honestyBody2: Your audio is analyzed, then deleted immediately — on the server and on this device. Only the measured numbers are kept.
Measure.recordingMax: Recording… max {{time}}. Sing close to the microphone.
Measure.resultNote: These four criteria now show as Measured on your performance; the rest keep the AI estimate and community votes. Your audio has been deleted.
Measure.micPermissionError: Microphone permission is required to measure your recording.
Measure.startError: Could not start recording — close other apps using the microphone.
Measure.sessionExpiredError: Your session expired — sign in again to measure.
Measure.notOwnerError: Only the performer can measure their own performance.

Language.label: Language
Language.restartBody: This language changes text direction. Please close and reopen VoxScore for the layout to update fully.

Request.title: Add a performance
Request.subtitle: Paste a YouTube link. We embed it (never download) and send it for review.
Request.reviewNote: Requests are reviewed by an admin before they appear in the league.
Request.successTitle: Your request is in the review queue
Request.successBody: Request ID: {{id}}. An admin will review it soon.
Request.noRequests: You haven't submitted any requests yet.
Request.signInPrompt: Sign in to add a performance
Request.sessionExpired: Your session expired — sign in again and retry.
Request.duplicateVideo: That video is already in the league.
Request.duplicatePending: A request for this video is already pending review.
Request.invalidUrl: That doesn’t look like a valid YouTube link.

Battle.sub: Two performances, one winner. Listen to both, then decide.
Battle.signInBody: Battles pit two performances head-to-head. Sign in to listen to both and pick the winner.
Battle.emptyBody: Not enough performances to battle yet. Add more from the leaderboard, then check back.
Battle.missingVideo: This battle is missing a video. Try another.
Battle.sessionExpiredLoad: Your session expired — sign in again and retry.
Battle.gateLocked: Listen to BOTH performances fully to unlock the winner pick.
Battle.gateUnlocked: Both performances listened — pick your winner.
Battle.embedBlockedHint: Embedding disabled — plays on YouTube only, can’t verify here.
Battle.notFullyListened: Not fully listened — watch again to count.
Battle.signInToPick: Sign in to pick a winner ›
Battle.sessionExpiredVote: Your session expired — sign in again to vote.
Battle.bothMustBeListened: Both performances must be fully listened to vote.
Battle.alreadyVoted: You have already voted in this battle.

Performance.embedBlockedHint: The uploader disabled embedding, so this video only plays on YouTube — an in-app Verified Listen (required to vote) isn’t possible for it.
Performance.verifiedHint: Verified Listen complete — you can vote now.
Performance.listeningHint: Keep watching to the end to unlock voting…
Performance.invalidHint: Listen not verified. Watch the full performance to vote.
Performance.idleHint: Press play and watch to the end to unlock voting.
Performance.signInToVote: Sign in to submit your vote ›
Performance.listenRequired: A completed Verified Listen is required to vote.
Performance.sessionExpiredVote: Your session expired — sign in again to vote.
Performance.selfVote: You cannot vote on your own performance.
Performance.attestationGate: Verification required. Voting from the app unlocks once device attestation ships — you can vote on the web for now.
Performance.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this performance.
Performance.measuredCaption: Measured criteria come from the artist’s own submitted recording — the audio is analyzed, then deleted.
Performance.noComments: No comments yet — be the first.
